message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'pipeline_open' sets signal field 'pipeline_ctx.job_count', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=pipeline_ctx;field=job_count;offset=256] [oracle:assert=pipeline_ctx.job_count stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets job_count without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
